title: DXC Completes Enterprise-Wide Amazon Quick Deployment ...
full_text: ASHBURN, Va., Feb. 10, 2026 /PRNewswire/ - DXC Technology (NYSE: DXC), a leading enterprise technology and innovation partner, today announced the completion of DXC's enterprise-wide deployment of Amazon Quick, the agentic AI-powered digital workspace, across its global workforce of 115,000 employee
